allow: Bash(echo "=== 修改文件列表 ===" && git status --short | grep -E "\(trace-writer|validator-integration|ingest-history\)" || echo "未提交的修改" *)
Bash(git commit -m 'chore: remove temporary files and legacy configurations *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs: update documentation structure and content *)
Bash(git commit -m 'refactor\(core\): improve domain layer mapping and type conversion *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(ingest\): enhance agent history ingestion and validation *)
